title: Google Maps Scraper Input
description: Scrape Google Maps business listings: name, address, phone, website, ratings, reviews, opening hours, GPS coordinates. Free alternative to Google Places API. No API key needed.

searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Search query for Google Maps (e.g., 'restaurants in Tokyo', 'dentists near San Francisco', 'hotels in Paris'). Leave empty if using Place URLs.

placeUrls.title: Place URLs
placeUrls.description: List of Google Maps place URLs to scrape for detailed information. Use this for specific businesses you already know.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to return.

includeReviews.title: Include Reviews
includeReviews.description: Fetch detailed place info including reviews. Slower but provides richer data.
